# NY English Teacher

> Professional Business English coaching for executives, tech professionals, and startup founders in Mexico and Latin America.

## About

NY English Teacher is a professional English coaching practice founded by Robert Cushman, a New York-based English coach with 20+ years of experience. We specialize in helping Mexican and Latin American professionals master the business English skills that drive career advancement — not classroom English, but the high-stakes communication that wins deals, earns promotions, and commands respect in North American business environments.

## Who We Serve

- C-suite executives and senior leaders
- Tech professionals and software developers (especially nearshore teams)
- Startup founders raising capital or entering US markets
- Logistics and supply chain managers
- Medical doctors, lawyers, and licensed professionals
- Professionals preparing for interviews and presentations

## Core Services

- [Business & Executive English](https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/executive-english/): 1-on-1 coaching for senior leaders who need to communicate with authority in English
- [English for Startup Founders](https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/startup-founders/): Pitch decks, investor meetings, and board communication
- [English for Tech](https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/tech-english/): Sprint ceremonies, code reviews, client demos, async communication
- [English for Logistics](https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/logistics-english/): Supply chain communication, vendor negotiations, compliance documentation
- [English for Doctors, Lawyers & Professionals](https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/professional-english/): Industry-specific vocabulary and patient/client communication
- [Interview & Presentation Coaching](https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/high-stakes-english/): High-stakes preparation for career-defining moments

## What Makes Us Different

1. **Performance coaching, not ESL**: We don't teach grammar — we train professionals to perform in English under pressure
2. **Mexico & LATAM focus**: Deep understanding of the specific challenges Spanish-speaking professionals face in North American business contexts
3. **Industry-specific**: Coaching tailored to your sector (tech, finance, medical, legal, logistics)
4. **Results in weeks, not years**: Clients report measurable improvement in 3-5 sessions
5. **Bilingual site**: Full English and Spanish versions of all content

## Pricing

Sessions range from $25 USD per session to $300 USD for a 12-session package. Corporate packages available.

## Languages

- Site available in English (en-US) and Spanish (es-MX)
- Coaching delivered in English with Spanish support
